data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Member-only pricing and early access', but the evidence does not confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions various membership levels and pricing, yet there is no explicit mention or evidence of member-only pricing or early access features. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary details to confirm the existence of these features are absent.
gaps: No evidence of member-only pricing and early access features.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
